creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On Thu, 20 Jan 2000 maske@thinblue.net wrote:

> ftp to ftp://ftp.thinblue.net/pub/FreeBSD/distfiles and grab
> diskusage1.tar.gz to get the Makefiles
> grab
> diskusage-1.01.tar.gz to get the distfiles.

diskusage1.tar.gz does not seem to contain anything:

jedgar@earth:~/ports$ ls -l diskusage1.tar.gz 
-rw-r--r--   1 jedgar   jedgar         60 Jan 21 00:41 diskusage1.tar.gz
jedgar@earth:~/ports$ tar zxvf diskusage1.tar.gz 
jedgar@earth:~/ports$


-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
